verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Take up thy cross and follow Me I heard my Master say I gave My life to ransom thee Surrender your all today

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Wherever He leads I'll go Wherever He leads I'll go I'll follow my Christ who loves me so Wherever He leads I'll go

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He drew me closer to His side I sought His will to know And in that will I now abide Wherever He leads I'll go
